items.title: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
items.summary: The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.

items.title: DeepL acquires Mixhalo for live-event audio streaming and translation
items.summary: With this acquisition, DeepL is opening an office in San Francisco to expand its U.S. business.

items.title: Claire Valdez Wants to Be Your Artist in Congress
items.summary: The New York State assemblywoman, who is running for a seat in the House of Representatives, spoke with Hyperallergic about her life as a painter, political origin story, and big plans for Washington.
